app.name: AgentWeave
app.tagline: Ask naturally. The agent will handle the work.
appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose from the themes packaged by this App.
appearance.systemFont: Using the App's system font fallback.
language.title: Language
language.description: Choose from the languages packaged by this App.
settings.title: Settings
settings.ownerSkillsDescription: Manage authorized skill packages and revisions.
settings.developerToolsDescription: Manage local skill packages while the development API is enabled.
hostBootstrap.unavailable: Trusted App configuration is unavailable. Optional Host features remain closed.
foundation.description: Trusted host surfaces for connected services and durable personal context.
foundation.mailAccountsDescription: Connection state, provider identity, and scopes
foundation.pendingActionsDescription: Authoritative previews, approvals, and delivery state
foundation.memoryLedgerDescription: Inspect provenance, export, correct, or forget
foundation.accounts.title: Mail accounts
foundation.accounts.subtitle: Credentials never enter the renderer
foundation.accounts.emptyDescription: Enable a conforming Mail connector in the Agent App manifest.
foundation.accounts.hostChangeNotice: Connection changes are performed by the trusted host.
foundation.memory.title: Memory ledger
foundation.memory.subtitle: Inspectable, sourced, and forgettable
foundation.memory.emptyDescription: Proposals appear only after confirmation. Try a different query or ask the Agent to remember a preference.
foundation.memory.forgetDescription: The value and evidence will be scrubbed and removed from derived search. A non-sensitive tombstone remains for audit.
foundation.actions.title: Action desk
foundation.actions.subtitle: Authoritative previews and durable delivery state
foundation.actions.emptyDescription: Mail sends appear here only after an authoritative preview is persisted.
foundation.actions.terminalNote: This action is immutable and no longer accepts a decision.
model.title: Model connection
model.description: Configure the local OpenAI-compatible endpoint used by chat.
model.keyStored: API key stored with operating-system encryption
identity.signInDescription: Continue with the account service configured by this App's developer. Credentials stay with that service and secure local storage.
identity.waitingForBrowser: Complete sign-in in your browser. This page will update automatically.
identity.unavailable: The account service is temporarily unavailable. Check your connection and try again.
identity.privacyNote: AgentWeave does not store passwords or expose sign-in tokens to the model.
identity.accountDescription: Manage the sign-in session for this App. Model and gateway configuration stays hidden here.
identity.completingSignIn: Verifying the browser response and preparing your private workspace…
identity.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Sign in again to continue without changing your local account data.
identity.clearLocalDataDescription: This signs out and permanently deletes this account's local conversations, Memory, settings, and model secrets from this device. Other accounts are not changed.
chat.reconnecting: Reconnecting to the local agent and resuming from saved progress…
chat.stopping: Stopping after the current safe boundary…
chat.cancelled: Generation stopped. Saved progress remains in this conversation.
chat.turnFailed: The agent turn failed. Saved progress is available in the conversation history.
chat.interrupted: The local agent restarted during this turn. Saved progress was recovered.
chat.sendError: Could not send message. Check your model or service connection.
chat.structuredActionFailed: This card action could not be completed. Refresh the conversation and try again.
chat.structuredActionRetry: The action failed. You can try again.
chat.starter: Hello! How can I help you today?
conversation.title: Conversations
conversation.loadError: This conversation could not be loaded. Retry from the history list.
conversation.listError: Conversation history is unavailable. Your current chat is unchanged.
conversation.conflictError: Conversation history changed elsewhere. The latest version has been loaded.
conversation.deleteDescription: Delete “{name}” and its local message history? This cannot be undone.
developer.title: Developer Tools
developer.apiUnavailableHint: Start the server with AGENTWEAVE_DEV_API=1 to manage local skills.
developer.actionFailed: Action failed. Keep the current inventory and try again.
developer.noPackagesHint: Adjust the search or create a new package.
developer.packageDetailsHint: Select a package to inspect prompts, diagnostics, and exported tools.
developer.noRuntimeToolsHint: This package currently provides instruction assets only.
developer.deleteWarning: Deleting this package removes local developer assets for {name}.
developer.deleteQuestion: Delete {name} and remove its local development assets?
developer.authoring.createSubtitle: Describe what the skill should do. The agent handles the package details.
developer.authoring.modelRequired: Connect a model to start creating
developer.authoring.modelRequiredHint: Skill Creator uses your saved LLM API settings for the authoring conversation. Your API key stays in the Host credential store.
developer.authoring.setupFailed: Skill Creator could not load the model or skill source. Close this window and try again.
developer.authoring.guideTitle: From an idea to a valid skill
developer.authoring.guideHint: Speak naturally. Skill Creator decides the name, trigger description, instructions, and package metadata with you.
developer.authoring.welcomeCreate: What should this skill help the agent do? A real example of what someone would ask is the best place to start.
developer.authoring.welcomeEdit: What would you like to change about {name}? Describe the behavior you want, and I’ll inspect the current skill with you.
developer.authoring.draftPrepared: I’ve prepared a skill draft for you to review and apply.
developer.authoring.sendFailed: Skill Creator could not complete that turn. Check the model connection and try again.
developer.authoring.draftDirectory: The proposed draft changed the existing package folder. Ask Skill Creator to revise it without renaming the package.
developer.authoring.draftFormat: The proposed draft was incomplete. Ask Skill Creator to prepare the skill draft again.
developer.authoring.conflict: This skill changed on disk. Close Skill Creator, refresh the inventory, and apply your change again.
developer.authoring.applyFailed: The draft could not be applied. Continue the conversation to revise it, or refresh the skill inventory and try again.
developer.authoring.completeHint: The Host validated the package and reloaded the active skill snapshot.
developer.authoring.completeReloadFailed: The package was saved, but the active snapshot could not be reloaded. Close this window and use Reload diagnostics.
developer.authoring.createPlaceholder: For example: Help me turn rough meeting notes into a concise decision log…
developer.authoring.composerHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line
developer.release.apiLoading: Connecting to the release control plane
developer.release.unavailableHint: Open an AgentWeave project with its developer configuration, then try again.
developer.release.modelTitle: Choose who controls the model connection
developer.release.modelDescription: This decision determines whether the packaged App exposes editable model settings.
developer.release.modelSaveError: The model policy could not be saved. Reload the project and try again.
developer.release.policyUserDescription: The packaged App keeps Model connection in Settings. AgentWeave does not require a user account or gateway.
developer.release.policyUserFact2: Every user manages their own API key
developer.release.policyManagedDescripti: Model settings disappear from the packaged App. Identity, entitlements, and a verified gateway become release requirements.
developer.release.policyManagedFact1: The developer controls model and cost
developer.release.policyManagedFact2: Users sign in instead of entering a key
developer.release.currentProfileHint: Only public facts are shown; upstream credentials stay in the developer vault.
developer.release.byokNote: The developer build carries no model credential. Each user stores their key with operating-system encryption.
developer.release.accessNotRequiredTitle: User accounts and a model gateway are not required
developer.release.accessNotRequiredDescr: The current App lets every user configure their own model connection.
developer.release.switchManagedHint: Switch to App-managed model delivery before choosing identity and entitlement plugins.
developer.release.accessDescription: These plugins form one fail-closed path from user sign-in to model usage.
developer.release.runtimeReady: Runtime access is ready for packaging
developer.release.runtimeReadyHint: The authenticated health check matches the deployed Worker version and project lock.
developer.release.identityStepDescriptio: AgentWeave supplies the secure Host contract. The selected service owns registration, passwords, recovery, and user lifecycle.
developer.release.identityConfigDescript: Only public OIDC facts are stored in the App. Login tokens remain in the Host credential vault.
developer.release.entitlementDescription: Choose the developer service that decides whether a signed-in user may spend model capacity.
developer.release.gatewayStepDescription: The gateway keeps the developer model credential outside the App package and enforces identity, entitlement, and usage limits.
developer.release.cloudflareDescription: The authorization belongs to the developer control plane only. It is never copied into the packaged App or used as a user login.
developer.release.customOauthHint: Recommended for white-label and enterprise releases that do not use the AgentWeave public client.
developer.release.scopeCatalogHint: Enter one Cloudflare permission name and scope ID per line as name=id.
developer.release.oauth.disconnected.hin: A browser window will request only the scopes declared by the gateway plugin.
developer.release.oauth.awaiting_callbac: Complete authorization in Cloudflare. This screen refreshes automatically.
developer.release.oauth.select_account.h: The deployment plan will be bound to exactly one Cloudflare account.
developer.release.oauth.ready.title: Developer authorization is ready
developer.release.oauth.ready.hint: The grant is encrypted on this development machine and excluded from release artifacts.
developer.release.oauth.ready.label: Ready
developer.release.oauth.expired.title: Developer authorization expired
developer.release.oauth.expired.hint: Reconnect before creating a new deployment plan.
developer.release.oauth.expired.label: Expired
developer.release.modelConfigTitle: Configure the model path and safety limits
developer.release.modelConfigDescription: Public endpoints and ceilings enter the project. Secret values cross the trusted Host boundary once and never return to this screen.
developer.release.modelNameRequired: Enter the exact model identifier that the gateway will allow.
developer.release.secretsHint: Stored in the developer vault, then written directly to Worker secret bindings
developer.release.secretRotatePlaceholde: Stored securely — enter a new value to rotate
developer.release.secretPlaceholder: Enter once; the value is never written to the project
developer.release.deployTitle: Save, deploy, and verify the release path
developer.release.deployDescription: Each action has an explicit trust boundary. Packaging remains blocked until the authenticated gateway check creates a matching deployment lock.
developer.release.operationIdentity: Sign in as a gateway test user
developer.release.operationPlan: Inspect drift and create an immutable plan
developer.release.verificationComplete: The authenticated gateway version matches the project. Packaging is now unlocked.
developer.release.noSecretsInPackage: The package contains no developer Cloudflare grant, upstream API key, or entitlement service credential.
developer.release.errorAccounts: Cloudflare accounts could not be loaded. Reconnect and try again.
developer.release.errorCustomOauth: Enter a public OAuth client ID and its authoritative scope catalog.
developer.release.errorSecrets: Enter every required deployment secret, or keep the stored revision unchanged.
developer.release.errorAccountSelection: Cloudflare did not confirm the selected account.
developer.release.errorPlanRequired: Create a fresh deployment plan before applying changes.
developer.release.errorGeneric: The release operation failed. Review the current step and try again.
developer.release.lifecycle.title: Deployment operations
developer.release.lifecycle.description: Inspect and maintain the published gateway without exposing cloud credentials to the App package.
developer.release.lifecycle.noDeployment: A verified or newly applied deployment is required.
developer.release.lifecycle.rotationRequ: Enter the new secret value before rotating.
developer.release.lifecycle.rollbackRequ: Enter the exact Worker version to restore.
developer.release.lifecycle.destroyPlanR: Create a fresh destroy plan before deleting resources.
developer.release.lifecycle.inspectHint: Inspect to compare the active version.
developer.release.lifecycle.maintenanceH: Rotation and rollback invalidate the release lock until the gateway is verified again.
developer.release.lifecycle.dangerHint: Remote deletion and local Cloudflare disconnection are separate actions.
developer.release.lifecycle.rotateDescri: The value goes directly to the trusted deployment Host. It is never returned to this screen or written to the project.
developer.release.lifecycle.rollbackDesc: Only the Worker code version changes. Secrets, routes, D1, and KV are outside this rollback boundary. Packaging will be locked until verification succeeds.
developer.release.lifecycle.destroyDescr: Review the immutable resource list below. This deletes the listed remote resources and invalidates the local release lock.
developer.release.lifecycle.disconnectDe: This removes the developer OAuth grant from this machine. It does not delete the deployed Worker.
developer.build.title: Build this App
developer.build.description: Review every release boundary and create the packaged desktop App from this trusted project.
developer.build.readyHint: {count} Skill package(s) passed the current readiness checks.
developer.build.checkProjectReady: The App manifest and developer project share one validated revision.
developer.build.checkProjectMissing: The trusted developer project could not be loaded.
developer.build.checkModelManaged: The App provides the model through the fixed release profile.
developer.build.checkModelUser: Each user supplies and stores their own model connection.
developer.build.checkAccessReady: The selected plugin versions and public configuration are pinned.
developer.build.checkAccessMissing: Choose compatible identity and entitlement plugins.
developer.build.checkGatewayReady: The deployed Worker passed an authenticated version check.
developer.build.checkGatewayMissing: Deploy and verify the model gateway.
developer.build.checkGatewayNotRequired: No developer-funded gateway is required in user-configurable mode.
developer.build.checkSkillsUnavailable: The Skill inventory is unavailable; packaging fails closed.
developer.build.packageFailed: The App could not be packaged.
android.settings.appearanceDescription: Theme choices are provided by this Agent App package.
android.settings.secretReferenceHint: Rust receives non-secret configuration and a secret reference.
android.settings.modelManagedDescription: Requests use the App's published gateway. The endpoint and credentials cannot be changed here.
android.chat.attachmentsUnavailable: Attachments are unavailable in the Android MVP
